description: Plots an implicit equation f(x,y)=0 on a 2D graph using marching squares.

arguments.name: equation
arguments.description: Implicit equation as quoted string (e.g., "x^2 + y^2 - 4")

examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,4), 20, 20, range(-3, 3), range(-3, 3), type(plotting))
implicitplot(G, "x^2 + y^2 - 4", c(blue))
